steps.title: Find the constant m using the given condition
steps.content:
We know that when x = 120 shirts, the total cost is \$960. Substitute into $c(x) = mx + 600$:
$$960 = m(120) + 600$$
$$960 - 600 = 120m$$
$$m = 3$$

steps.title: Calculate the cost for 900 shirts
steps.content:
Substitute x = 900 and $m = 3$ into the function:
$$c(900) = 3(900) + 600$$
$$c(900) = 2700 + 600 = 3300$$
The total cost to produce 900 shirts is 3300 dollars.
